item.title: 3D-bioprinted human skin model expands options for preclinical research

Mayo Clinic study finds remote monitoring may detect early complications, reduce burden for lung transplant patients

Blood test shows promise for detecting testicular cancer when standard markers miss
Mayo Clinic study finds bariatric surgery associated with greater long-term heart risk reduction than weight-loss medications

Mayo Clinic builds on breakthrough discoveries to advance care for ALS and FTD
